block_02: We would like to inform you that beginning next week, swap fees will be charged for keeping margin positions open overnight. These changes will come into effect as of Monday, December 14, 2020, and will affect both new positions and positions that remain open after December 14, 2020.
block_03: The updated information about swap sizes for each of the trading instruments will appear on the trading platform on Monday, December 14, 2020. Please note that swap fees will be deducted from the trading balance every weekday at 22:00 GMT. For positions rolled over the weekend swap fees will be charged on Friday 22:00 GMT.
